element_introduction_order.element: Burger ingredients (bun, patty, tomato, lettuce, cheese)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Walking across ingredients to drop them; foundational mechanic
Vertical and horizontal navigation; spatial reasoning core
First enemy type introduced; patrol behavior established
Second enemy type; variant patrol/chase patterns
Third enemy type completing core threat variety
Directional stun mechanic; limited resource management

element_introduction_order.element: Bonus food items (ice cream, coffee, fries)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spawns after set drops; grants points and extra pepper

element_introduction_order.element: Ingredient crushing mechanic (enemies under falling items)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Risk/reward variant of dropping; bonus points available

element_introduction_order.element: Ingredient dropping with enemies on it (2-level bonus drop)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-risk play style; fastest level completion but collision risk

typical_relief_triggers: Pepper stun effect active (brief safety window)
Bonus food pickup (points and extra pepper)
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy approaching from multiple angles in narrow passages
Multiple ingredients remaining in level (extended pressure)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical pressure with punctuated relief. Tension builds as enemies pursue; relief granted through ingredient completions and pepper stuns. Maintains sustained pressure across six boards of increasing difficulty.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Single enemies, simple ingredient arrangements, abundant pepper supply. Player learns drop mechanic and basic maze navigation.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multiple concurrent enemies, more complex platform layouts requiring careful pathing, increased enemy spawn frequency.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy populations, intricate mazes that create cornering traps, layouts designed to block safe passage, cycling difficulty through board repetition.
notable_spikes: Transition from Level 1 to Level 2 (introduction of multiple simultaneous enemies)
Post-board-6 cycle repeat (difficulty resets but player expectation raises)

notable_level_patterns.description: Vertically aligned burger ingredients must all fall in sequence to complete burger on waiting plate. Completion grants relief and clear level progress.
Three enemy types (Hot Dog, Pickle, Egg) establish different pursuit patterns. Enemies respawn at edges (if crushed) or landing point (if dropped), forcing repeated encounters.
Later boards (4-6) feature platform layouts that funnel Peter into dead-end positions, limiting escape routes and increasing enemy collision probability.
Dropping ingredient while enemies stand on it causes 2-level bonus drop, awards more points, speeds level completion, but increases collision risk significantly.
